sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote: <L>22015.60<pc>126,2<k1>A<k2>A/<e>1A ¦ <s>A-samudram</s> or <s>A-samudrAt</s>, ‘as far as the ocean’ or ‘from the ocean’ (but not including it) <LEND>

<L>7766<pc>1-0581<k1>A<k2>A<h>2
2. {#A#}¦
<div n="1"> 1) <lex>adv.</lex>
<div n="2"> a) {%her, herzu%}: {#A tU na^ indra kOSika mandasA\naH su\taM pi^ba#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,10,11.</ls> {#a\nu\kA\maM ta^rpayeTA\mindrA^varuRa rA\ya A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">17,3.</ls> {#A pra dra^va#}
<ls>AV. 3,4,5.</ls> {#A pra yA^tu parA\vata^H#}
<ls n="AV.">6,35,1.</ls> {#A pra cya^veTAm#}
<ls n="AV.">18,4,49.</ls> In dieser Bedeutung überaus häufig in Verbindung mit Verben {%der Bewegung.%}
<div n="2">— b) anreihend: {%dazu, ferner, auch, und%}: {#sarva^M pa\ReH sama^vindanta\ Boja^na\maSvA^vanta\M goma^nta\mA pa\SuM nara^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,83,4.</ls> {#(tanmahyamAhuH) tada\yaM keto^ hf\da A vi ca/zwe#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">24,12.</ls> {#ma\hAngarBo\ mahyA jA\tame^zAm#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,31,3.</ls> {#udidA^Bya\H Suci\rA pU\ta e^mi#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,17,10.</ls> {#apa\ dvezA\MsyA kf^Di#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,16,5.</ls> {#Sa\tamA sa\hasra^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,14,7.</ls> {#mi\mi\kzvA samiLA^Bi\rA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,48,16.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">7,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">150,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">4,11,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 4,">12,2.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) steigernd und hervorhebend: {%zumal, ganz, gar%}; nicht selten dient es nur um auf das Wort, nach welchem es steht, den Nachdruck zu werfen. {#aDa^ sva\nAnma\rutA\M viSva\mA sadma\ pArTi^vam . are^janta\ pra mAnu^zAH#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,38,10.</ls> {#ko vo\ varzi^zWa\ A na^raH#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">37,6.</ls> {#tatsu no\ viSve^ a\rya A sadA^ gfRanti kA\rava^H#}
<ls n="ṚV.">6,45,33.</ls> {#baLi\tTA ma^hi\mA vA\mindrA^gnI\ pani^zWa\ A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 6,">59,2.</ls> {#yaH su^nva\te paca^te du\Dra A ci^t#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,12,15.</ls> {#muhu\rA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 2,">4,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,20,2.</ls> {#pra bo^DayA\ pura^MDiM jA\ra A sa^sa\tImi^va#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,134,3.</ls> {#udI^raya pi\tarA^ jA\ra A Baga^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,11,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">22,3.</ls> <ls>AV. 6,33,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">7,22,1.</ls> {#taddevA jyotizAM jyotirAyurhyopAsate 'mftam#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,7,2,20</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 4,4,16). 9,2,3,44.</ls> {#tasyEza AdeSo yadetadvidyuto vyadyutadA itIti nyamImizadA#}
<ls>KENOP. 29.</ls> Aus Stellen wie ein Theil der hier angeführten wurde die Bedeutung {%wie%} abgeleitet, welche aber nicht unmittelbar im Worte liegt.
<ls>NIR. 3,13.</ls>
<ls>ŚAṂK.</ls> zu <ls>KENOP. 19.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) zur Verstärkung oder näheren Bestimmung verschiedener <ab>praepp.</ab> dienend; bei {#antar#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,67,23.</ls> {#aDi#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">73,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,73,">6.</ls> {#anu#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,38,7.</ls> {#sacA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,9,3.</ls> <ab>S. u.</ab> <ab>d. Ww.</ab>
<div n="1">— 2) <ab>praep.</ab>
<div n="2"> a) {%zu — hin, bis an, bis zu, bis auf, bevor%}:
<div n="3"> α) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>: {#tA~ A #}
[Page1-0582]
{# madA^ya vajrahasta pI\taye\ hari^ByAM yA\hyoka\ A#}
<ls>ṚV. 7,32,4.</ls> {#f\tasya\ yoni\mA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,66,12.</ls> {#(DAvati) sa\pta pra\vata\ A diva^m#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">54,2.</ls> {#joza\mA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">8,83,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,43,4.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) mit <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>, häufig im
<ls>ŚAT. BR.</ls> in Verbindung mit {#it#}, wozu ein Zeitwort der Bewegung zu ergänzen: {#etpuroqASameva kUrmaM BUtaM sarpantam#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,6,2,3.</ls> {#punarema iti devA edagniM tiroBUtam#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">2,2,3,3.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 2,2,">4,12.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 2,">3,4,2.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,1,3,4.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">11,5,1,4.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 11,5,1,">11.</ls>
<div n="3">— γ) mit <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>abl.</ab>
<ls>P. 2,1,13.</ls> <ls n="P. 2,">3,10.</ls> {#sva\styA gf\heBya\ Ava\sA A vi\mocanA^t#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,53,20.</ls> {#AsyA ya\jYasyo\dfca^H#}
<ls>VS. 4,9.</ls> {#A mUlA^t#}
<ls>AV. 7,59,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">12,4,16.</ls> {#A ja^ri\mRaH#}
<ls n="AV.">18,3,62.</ls> <ls n="AV.">1,14,3.</ls> {#SIrzRa A pucCAt#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 10,2,1,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,1,3,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">12,8,3,17.</ls> {#EtasmAtkAlAt#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,2,4,5.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,5,2,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">2,4,2,21.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,2,1,7.</ls> {#yadidaM kiM ca miTunamA pipIlikAByaH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">14,4,2,9</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,4,4</ls>). {#yattapastapyata A mETunAt#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">10,4,4,4.</ls> <ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 2,2,2.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR. 2,">6,9.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR.">12,4,1.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR. 12,">6,18.</ls> {#A samudrAttu vE pUrvAdA samudrAttu paScimAt . tayorevAntaraM giryorAryAvartaM vidurbuDAH ..#}
<ls>M. 2,22.</ls> {#A hEva sa naKAgreByaH paramaM tapyate tapaH#}
<ls n="M. 2,">167.</ls> {#A zoqaSAt#} {%bis zum 16ten%} (Jahre)
<ls n="M. 2,">38.</ls> {#ArkadarSanAt#}
<ls n="M. 2,">101.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">108.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">171.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">243.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">244.</ls> <ls n="M.">3,279.</ls> <ls n="M.">4,137.</ls> <ls n="M.">5,88.</ls> <ls n="M. 5,">158.</ls> <ls n="M.">6,31.</ls> <ls n="M.">9,70.</ls> <ls n="M. 9,">89.</ls> <ls n="M.">10,64.</ls> <ls n="M. 10,">91.</ls> <ls n="M. 10,">104.</ls> <ls>YĀJÑ. 3,23.</ls> <ls>MBH. 1,4405.</ls> <ls>BHAG. 8,16.</ls> <ls>R. 1,6,25.</ls> <ls n="R.">2,32,32.</ls> <ls n="R. 2,32,">38.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,34,23.</ls> <ls n="R. 3,">46,2.</ls> {#udayaM parvataM gatvA A mAsAdvinivartata#} {%bevor ein Monat um ist, in Monatsfrist%}
<ls n="R.">4,40,69.</ls> <ls n="R. 4,">58,34.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 2.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">26.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">71,10.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 1,90.</ls> <ls n="RAGH. 1,">91.</ls> An das <ab>subst.</ab> tritt <ab>pleon.</ab> noch {#anta#} {%Grenze%}: {#odakAntAt#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 54,21.</ls>
<div n="3">— δ) verbindet sich mit dem regierten Worte zu einem <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>
<ls>P. 2,1,13.</ls> {#aSvApadAnyAkIwapataMgapipIlakam#}
<ls>CHĀND. UP. 7,2,1. 8,1.</ls> {#AsapiRqakriyAkarma#}
<ls>M. 3,247.</ls> {#AkarRamUlamAkfzya#} ({#kArmukam#})
<ls>R. 4,9,106.</ls> {#AmaraRam#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. I,44.</ls> {#maRibanDAdAkanizWaM karasya karaBo bahiH#}
<ls>AK. 2,6,2,32.</ls> {#AvatsarAntam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 23,20.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">10,208.</ls>
<ls>VID. 54.</ls> {#AkumAraM yaSaH pARineH#}
<ls>P. 2,1,13</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#Adfzwiprasaram#} (so ist zu lesen)
<ls>AMAR. 74.</ls> Statt {#AsamudrAnte#}
<ls>R. 4,37,3</ls> ist wohl {#˚ntam#} zu lesen. Am <ab>Anf.</ab> eines <ab>comp.</ab> ohne Flexionszeichen: {#AyojanasuganDin#}
<ls>MBH. 1,6965.</ls> {#AjAnubAhu#} {%dessen Arme bis an die Knie reichen%}
<ls>R. 1,1,12.</ls> {#AkarRamuktErizuBiH#}
<ls n="R.">3,69,16.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 1,5.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 80.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">145.</ls> <ls>VID. 21.</ls> {#AmaraRAnta#} (
<ls>HIT. I,180</ls>) oder {#AmaraRAntika#} (
<ls>M. 9,101.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 3,8333</ls>) {%sich bis zum Tode erstreckend.%} <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#Ajarasam, Avyuzam, otsUryam#} .
<div n="3">— ε) bildet mit dem <ab>reg.</ab> Worte ein <ab>adj. comp.</ab>: {#AsaptamAMstasya#} ({%die siebente Welt mit%}) {#lokAnhinasti#}
<ls>MUṆḌ. UP. 1,2,3.</ls> {#AgopAlA dvijAtayaH#}
<ls>MBH. 2,531.</ls> {#kulamAsaptamaM#} (kann auch <lex>adv.</lex> sein) {#hanti#}
<ls>R. 4,34,16.</ls>
<ls>YĀJÑ. 1,205.</ls>
[Page1-0583]
<div n="2">— b) {%von — her, von — aus, von — weg, von — an%}:
<div n="3"> α) mit <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>abl.</ab>: {#trirA di\vaH sa^vita\rvAryA^Ri di\ve di^ ve\ A su^va\ trirno\ ahna^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,56,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 3,56,">7.</ls> {#A pa^rA\vata^H#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,92,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,92,">17.</ls> {#AntA\dA pa^rA\kAt#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">30,21.</ls> {#Sye\no ha\vyaM na^ya\tvA para^smAt#}
<ls>AV. 3,3,4.</ls> {#A prajApatito manoH#}
<ls>MBH. 1,3756.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,5,1.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 1,17.</ls> {#A bAlyAttApaso 'Bavam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 24,186.</ls> {#A janmanaH#} (<ab>v. l.</ab> {#janmataH#})
<ls>ŚĀK. 121.</ls> {#A mUlAcCrotumicCAmi#}
<ls n="ŚĀK.">14,19.</ls> <ls>KATHĀS. 25,195.</ls> {#A mUlataH#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">12,191.</ls> <ls>VID. 130.</ls> Mit <ab>folg.</ab> {#praBfti#} in einer <is>Prākṛt</is>-Stelle: {#A mUlAdo pahudi#}
<ls>ŚĀK. CH. 13,6.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>abl.</ab>: {#avA^daho di\va A dasyu^m#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,33,7.</ls> {#sa\mA\nAdA sada^saH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,17,7.</ls> {#a\smadA ni\do va\DEra^jeta durma\tim#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,129,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,66,6.</ls> <ls>AV. 4,15,11.</ls>
<div n="3">— γ) bildet mit dem <ab>reg.</ab> Worte ein <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>: {#mAM cApi — jAnanti hyAkumAram#}
<ls>MBH. 3,1403.</ls> {#sarvamAjanma vfttAntaM#} (so ist zu trennen) {#vistarAdidamabravIt#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 2,29</ls>
(<ab>vgl.</ab> <ls n="KATHĀS. 2,">28</ls> : {#tadbrUhi nijavfttAntaM janmanaH praBfti#}). In {#ASiraHpAdam#} {%vom Kopfe bis zu den Füssen%}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">4,53</ls> ist Anfang und Ende mit {#A#} zu einem <ab>comp.</ab> verbunden. Am <ab>Anf.</ab> eines <ab>comp.</ab> ohne Flexionszeichen: {#AjanmaSudDAnAm#}
<ls>RAGH. 1,5.</ls>
<ls>KATHĀS. 21,122.</ls> Auch bei dieser Bedeutung mit <ab>pleon.</ab> {#anta#} {%Grenze%}: {#AmajjanAntaM vfttAntaM saKyustasya ca varRayan#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 10,69.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) {%aus, von, unter%}, zur Hervorhebung eines Einzelnen unter Mehreren: {#yaSci\dDi tvA^ ba\huBya\ A su\tAvA^~ A\vivA^sati#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,84,9.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,84,">20.</ls> {#yaste\ saKi^Bya\ A vara^m#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">4,4.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) {%in, bei%}, mit dem <ab>loc.</ab>
<ls>NIR. 5,5.</ls> {#dama\ A#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,61,9.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">73,4.</ls> {#gAvo\ na yava^se\zvA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">91,13.</ls> {#kiyA\tyA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">113,10.</ls> {#u\pA\ka A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">27,6.</ls> {#Sa\ra\Ra A#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">150,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">82,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">112,17.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">2,30,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">4,11,1.</ls> {#a\Bra A#}
<ls n="ṚV.">5,48,1.</ls> {#sIda\nyonA\ vane\zvA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,62,8.</ls> {#ajI^jano amfta\ martye\zvA#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,110,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,">73,7.</ls> {#marya\M na yozA^ kfRute sa\DasTa\ A#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,40,2.</ls> {#sa\mu\dra A gU\|am#}
<ls n="ṚV. 10,">72,7.</ls> {#vara\ A pf^Ti\vyAH#}
<ls>AV. 7,8,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">16,4,2.</ls>
<div n="2">— e) im <ab>comp.</ab> mit einem <lex>adj.</lex> oder <ab>partic.</ab> {%etwas, ein wenig, kaum%}
<ls>P. 2,2,18</ls>, <ls>SAUN.</ls> <is>Vārtt</is>. 3.
Scheinbar <lex>adv.</lex>, aber ursprünglich gewiss <ab>praep.</ab> und zwar in der unter {%a.%} aufgeführten Bedeutung: {#ApIta#} {%bis zum Gelben angelangt, gelblich%}
<ls>R. 2,76,4.</ls> {#Alohita#}
<ab>v. l.</ab> zu <ls>ŚĀK. 69,2.</ls> {#AnIla#} {%bläulich%}
<ls>H. 1239.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 3,8.</ls> {#ApiYcara#}
<ls n="RAGH.">16,51.</ls> {#ApARqura#}
<ls>AMAR. 89.</ls> {#ozRa (A + uzRa)#}
<ls>P. 1,1,14</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#Akuwila#} {%etwas gebogen%}
<ls>ŚĀK. 184.</ls> {#AtiraScIna#} {%etwas in die Quere gehend%}
<ls>DAŚAK.</ls> in <ls>BENF. Chr. 198,23.</ls> {#Apakva#} (<ab>s. d.</ab>)
<ls>AK. 2,9,47.</ls> {#Alola#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 3,48</ls> ({#AlolAyatalocanAH#}).{# Alakzya#} {%kaum, eben sichtbar%}
<ls>ŚĀK. 176.</ls> {#ABugna#} {%ein wenig gebogen%}
<ls>RAGH. 1,83.</ls> — Um diese Partikel von der <lex>interj.</lex> {#A#} zu unterscheiden, versehen die indischen Grammatiker und Lexicographen dieselbe mit einem {#N#} am Ende ({#AN#}).
<ls>P. 1,1,14.</ls> <ls n="P. 1,">4,89.</ls> <ls n="P.">2,1,13.</ls> <ls n="P. 2,">3,10.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 1,8.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">2,19.</ls>
<ls>AK. 3,4,32,1.</ls> (<ls>COL. 3,4,28,1.</ls>) <ls>H. an. 7,2.</ls> <ls>MED. avy. 13.</ls> Euphonische Regeln in Betreff dieses {#A#}
<ls>P. 6,1,74.</ls> <ls n="P. 6,1,">95.</ls> <ls n="P. 6,1,">126</ls> ({#A~#}).
<ls>VOP. 2,5.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 2,">19.</ls> In vielen in Europa gedruckten Werken, in denen sonst die Trennung der Wörter beobachtet wird, findet man {#A#} mit einem folgenden <ab>abl.</ab> fälschlich zu einem <ab>comp.</ab> verbunden.
<LEND>

<L>13334<pc>1-157-c<k1>A<k2>A/<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#A/#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 <lex>Adv.</lex> <div n="2">— a〉 {%heran, herbei%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%dazu, ferner, auch%}. <div n="2">— c〉 das vorangehende Wort steigernd und hervorhebend; {%gerade, recht, zumal%}. Oft nur durch stärkere Betonung des vorangehenden Wortes wiederzugeben. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Praep.</ab> <div n="2">— a〉 mit vorangehendem <ab>Acc.</ab> {%zu — hin, bis an, — zu%}. <div n="2">— b〉 mit folgendem <ab>Acc.</ab> {%mit Ausschluss von%}. <div n="2">— c〉 mit vorangehendem <ab>Abl.</ab> <div n="3">— α〉 {%von — her, — aus, — weg, — an%}. <div n="3">— β〉 {%aus, von, unter%} (zur Hervorhebung eines Einzelnen unter Mehreren). <div n="2">— d〉 mit folgendem <ab>Abl.</ab> <div n="3">— α〉 {%bis zu%} (einem <ab>best.</ab> Orte, Zeitpunkte oder Eintritt eines Falles). <div n="3">— β〉 {%von — an%}. <div n="2">— e〉 mit vorangehendem <ab>Loc.</ab> {%an, auf, in, bei, zu%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 am <ab>Anf.</ab> eines <ab>Comp.</ab> <div n="2">— a〉 eines <lex>Adj.</lex> {%bis zu — sich erstreckend%}. <div n="2">— b〉 eines <lex>Adv.</lex> {%bis zu%}. <div n="2">— c〉 vor einem <lex>Adj.</lex> oder <ab>Subst.</ab> {%etwas, ein wenig, kaum; gering%}. <LEND>
